title: Asterocephalus uralensis
taxonomy: Asterocephalus uralensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Ural Mountains. The classification of Asterocephalus uralensis is a part of the plant's taxonomy, which is a way of categorizing and naming living things. In the kingdom Plantae, Asterocephalus uralensis belongs to the class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants. The classification of Asterocephalus uralensis is further refined into the order Gentianales.
